actions.expression:
SELECT krshsheet.sid,
       krshsheet.fphm,
       krshsheet.wxht,
       krshsheet.sydje,
       krshsheet.chyrq,
       krshsheet.shts,
       krshsheet.htje,
       krshsheet.myjje,
       krshsheet.ayjje,
       krshsheet.yjje,
       krshsheet.wsje,
       krshsheet.syrq,
       krshsheet.hbdm,
       krshsheet.yhhl,
       krshsheet.syqje,
       krshsheet.skyh,
       krshsheet.yhfy,
       krshsheet.yhje,
       krshsheet.ywry,
       krshsheet.sygs,
       krshsheet.ywbm,
       krshsheet.sybz,
       krshsheet.sfdr,
       krshsheet.sh,
       krshsheet.hjsh,
       krshsheet.sfjq,
       krshsheet.sfdj,
       krshsheet.sydje1,
       krshsheet.qsn,
       krshsheet.qsy,
       krshsheet.hzgx,
       krshsheet.fphm1,
       krshsheet.htjer,
       krshsheet.htjem,
       krshsheet.djjer,
       krshsheet.djjeM,
       krshsheet.djjemZ,
       krshsheet.djjerZ,
       krshsheet.fpjq,
       krshsheet.RMBkh,
       krshsheet.sydje2,
       krshsheet.qsny,
       krshsheet.ywpath,
       krshsheet.jqcw,
       krshsheet.wyzd,
       krshsheet.khmc
FROM krshsheet 
WHERE (krshsheet.fphm=[收汇情况.发票号码]) 
ORDER BY krshsheet.sid ASC
